title: Reconfiguring a kubeadm cluster — Applying CoreDNS configuration changes
text:
kubeadm deploys CoreDNS as a Deployment called
coredns
and with a Service
kube-dns
,
both in the
kube-system
namespace.
To update any of the CoreDNS settings, you can edit the Deployment and
Service objects:
kubectl edit deployment -n kube-system coredns
kubectl edit service -n kube-system kube-dns
Once the CoreDNS changes are applied you can restart the CoreDNS deployment:
kubectl rollout restart deployment -n kube-system coredns
